llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two agenda changes announced: Item 10.1 pulled/held for further information; Item 9.3 moved from consent to action for elaboration
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve. I'll second. All those in favor? Aye. Thank you.
